method_contract.technical_problem: 当前系统知道需要真实 field package，但缺少按隐藏状态拆解的采集-回放-控制恢复接口。
method_contract.technical_means: 把每个隐藏状态映射到外部证据通道、必需字段、可恢复 gate、证据边界和 no-write 边界。
method_contract.technical_effect: 让现场采集从通道级提交变成状态级补证，减少 scan 摩擦，并防止把 proxy/template 误写成 field 结论。
method_contract.evidence_boundary: 该接口只定义激活矩阵和补证路径；没有真实 field rows、holdout、replay 和人工复核时，不能生成 field-supported claim、actuator policy 或 release gate。

resumes_to: release-gate candidate review after field holdout and human review

next_operator_focus.operator_instruction: Collect real field rows for the listed evidence fields and keep batch_id/timestamp/node_id alignment; do not fill template markers or synthetic rows.

state_activation_rows.technical_problem: 低成本传感器不能直接高频测出残留污染物，需要用离线标签校准软传感估计。
state_activation_rows.technical_means: 把出水端低成本 proxy、离线实验标签和 endpoint label 对齐到同一 batch_id。
state_activation_rows.technical_effect: 让残留污染物从 synthetic proxy 推断升级为可回放、可 holdout 的现场候选证据。
state_activation_rows.evidence_boundary: pollutant_residual is not field validated; synthetic sparse/proxy/candidate-patch coverage can guide design, but cannot support field claim, actuator write or release gate.
state_activation_rows.no_write_boundary: This state row can prepare collection, replay and review candidates only; it cannot write actuator policy, release gate, patent/legal conclusion or field-supported claim.

resumes_to: release-gate candidate review after field holdout and human review

next_operator_focus.operator_instruction: Collect real field rows for the listed evidence fields and keep batch_id/timestamp/node_id alignment; do not fill template markers or synthetic rows.

state_activation_rows.technical_problem: 循环处理争取了时间，但没有现场停留时间和反应完成标签时不能判断是否该回流或放行。
state_activation_rows.technical_means: 把操作日志、HRT/接触时间和离线反应完成 proxy 绑定到同一时段。
state_activation_rows.technical_effect: 把回流、延长停留和暂存等待从经验动作变成可回放的控制候选。
state_activation_rows.evidence_boundary: reaction_completion is not field validated; synthetic sparse/proxy/candidate-patch coverage can guide design, but cannot support field claim, actuator write or release gate.
state_activation_rows.no_write_boundary: This state row can prepare collection, replay and review candidates only; it cannot write actuator policy, release gate, patent/legal conclusion or field-supported claim.

resumes_to: release-gate candidate review after field holdout and human review

next_operator_focus.operator_instruction: Collect real field rows for the listed evidence fields and keep batch_id/timestamp/node_id alignment; do not fill template markers or synthetic rows.

state_activation_rows.technical_problem: 催化剂活性是当前弱观测状态，缺少床层压降、再生事件和离线活性标签会阻断控制升级。
state_activation_rows.technical_means: 把催化床前后 proxy、床层压降、再生日志和离线活性标签作为同一状态激活包。
state_activation_rows.technical_effect: 让催化剂衰减、再生和更换从解释性假设变成可验证的保护性控制候选。
state_activation_rows.evidence_boundary: catalyst_activity is not field validated; synthetic sparse/proxy/candidate-patch coverage can guide design, but cannot support field claim, actuator write or release gate.
state_activation_rows.no_write_boundary: This state row can prepare collection, replay and review candidates only; it cannot write actuator policy, release gate, patent/legal conclusion or field-supported claim.

next_operator_focus.operator_instruction: Collect real field rows for the listed evidence fields and keep batch_id/timestamp/node_id alignment; do not fill template markers or synthetic rows.

state_activation_rows.technical_problem: 水质基质冲击会让软传感和催化效率外推失真，单纯进出水传感难以及时解释。
state_activation_rows.technical_means: 把进水 EC/浊度/ORP proxy、人工或离线 matrix shock 标签与 replay 事件对齐。
state_activation_rows.technical_effect: 让系统能识别何时应保守回流、暂存验证或切换处理单元，而不是盲目放行。
state_activation_rows.evidence_boundary: matrix_interference is not field validated; synthetic sparse/proxy/candidate-patch coverage can guide design, but cannot support field claim, actuator write or release gate.
state_activation_rows.no_write_boundary: This state row can prepare collection, replay and review candidates only; it cannot write actuator policy, release gate, patent/legal conclusion or field-supported claim.

resumes_to: release-gate candidate review after field holdout and human review

next_operator_focus.operator_instruction: Collect real field rows for the listed evidence fields and keep batch_id/timestamp/node_id alignment; do not fill template markers or synthetic rows.

state_activation_rows.technical_problem: 循环结构降低了传感响应速度要求，但必须知道延迟和路径，否则控制动作无法归因。
state_activation_rows.technical_means: 把路径阶段标签、流量、停留时间、回流比和动作生效时间写成水力延迟证据。
state_activation_rows.technical_effect: 让低频观测下的回流、延长停留和跨单元切换具备可回放的时间轴。
state_activation_rows.evidence_boundary: hydraulic_delay is not field validated; synthetic sparse/proxy/candidate-patch coverage can guide design, but cannot support field claim, actuator write or release gate.
state_activation_rows.no_write_boundary: This state row can prepare collection, replay and review candidates only; it cannot write actuator policy, release gate, patent/legal conclusion or field-supported claim.

resumes_to: release-gate candidate review after field holdout and human review

next_operator_focus.operator_instruction: Collect real field rows for the listed evidence fields and keep batch_id/timestamp/node_id alignment; do not fill template markers or synthetic rows.

state_activation_rows.technical_problem: 副产物或放行风险不能由低成本 proxy 直接证明，必须有人工复核和离线确认。
state_activation_rows.technical_means: 把终端放行标签、副产物离线检测和人工复核决策接入同一 release gate 证据链。
state_activation_rows.technical_effect: 让系统能生成放行候选或保护性阻断候选，但不绕过人工和离线验证。
state_activation_rows.evidence_boundary: release_or_byproduct_risk is not field validated; synthetic sparse/proxy/candidate-patch coverage can guide design, but cannot support field claim, actuator write or release gate.
state_activation_rows.no_write_boundary: This state row can prepare collection, replay and review candidates only; it cannot write actuator policy, release gate, patent/legal conclusion or field-supported claim.

writeback_policy.boundary: Even when a state-level route is ready, the matrix only routes evidence into replay/holdout/review. It never authorizes direct actuator, release-gate, legal or field-claim writes.

field_activation_response_source_preflig.no_write_boundary: The response source preflight only selects and shape-checks the response JSON. It does not prove field evidence, does not run replay/holdout, and cannot write actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

repair_items.issue: No external field activation response was supplied; default template is still being preflighted.
repair_items.required_action: Fill outputs/model_core_governance/field_activation_response_template.json with real field provenance, save it as an external response JSON, then set FIELD_ACTIVATION_RESPONSE_PATH.

repair_items.issue: Rows have not confirmed the no-write boundary.
repair_items.required_action: Set no_write_boundary_confirmed=true only after confirming the response cannot authorize actuator or release-gate writes.

repair_items.issue: Rows still use template markers in the field value payload.
repair_items.required_action: Replace evidence_value template markers with actual operator-supplied field values before package assembly.

repair_items.issue: Rows are missing batch/evidence-value alignment or still use template alignment markers.
repair_items.required_action: Fill batch_id and evidence_value_reference with real, traceable field/lab/table references.

repair_items.issue: Response rows still contain TODO/template/sample markers.
repair_items.required_action: Replace every template marker with real field provenance, values, methods or alignment references.

repair_items.issue: Some response rows are not marked with data_origin=field.
repair_items.required_action: Set data_origin=field only for rows backed by real field records; otherwise keep the response blocked.

repair_items.issue: Package assembly is blocked because the response preflight is not ready.
repair_items.required_action: Repair the response source/schema/evidence rows first; then regenerate the assembly plan and stage channel package candidates under the required package pointers.

field_activation_response_repair_work_or.no_write_boundary: This repair work order only tells an operator how to fix the field-activation response package. It cannot create field evidence, run replay/holdout, resume the model chain, or write actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

field_activation_response_preflight.no_write_boundary: Passing this preflight only means state-level evidence rows are filled and ready for downstream package/router preflight. It does not authorize actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

field_activation_response_completion_led.no_write_boundary: This ledger only measures response completion and machine-readiness gaps. It does not create field evidence, run replay/holdout, resume the model chain, write actuator policy, write a release gate, or upgrade any claim to field-supported.

field_activation_response_focus_handoff.field_boundary: This handoff narrows the next operator action from the full field activation response to the focused catalyst_activity rows when catalyst_activity is the next incomplete hidden state. The focused response still has to pass merge/full-response/package preflight before any field chain can resume.
field_activation_response_focus_handoff.no_write_boundary: The handoff is an operator-routing artifact only. It cannot create field evidence, authorize control actions, release water, relax Agent49 catalyst guardrails or upgrade synthetic results to field-supported claims.

field_activation_response_coherence_audi.no_write_boundary: This coherence audit checks whether a filled field-activation response can be assembled into replayable package candidates with batch/node/sensor/custody/method alignment. It does not prove field truth, does not run replay/holdout, and cannot write actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

required_contract_evidence: metadata.json with data_origin=field and no placeholder/template markers
timestamped sensor_timeseries rows with batch_id, timestamp, node_id/sensor_id and sensor_status
campaign_operation_log rows with action/effect timing and operator context
offline_lab_results rows linked by batch_id and method/detection-limit metadata
fast_proxy_event_log or equivalent proxy labels when pressure/conflict replay is evaluated
reject_if: metadata contains TODO, placeholder or template markers

timestamped sensor_timeseries rows with batch_id, timestamp, node_id/sensor_id and sensor_status
campaign_operation_log rows with action/effect timing and operator context
offline_lab_results rows linked by batch_id and method/detection-limit metadata
fast_proxy_event_log or equivalent proxy labels when pressure/conflict replay is evaluated
reject_if: metadata contains TODO, placeholder or template markers

required_contract_evidence: at least 5 same-batch aligned path/endpoint/lab/operation rows
reject_if: any required table is missing or header-only
template markers or non-field provenance are present
resumes_to: release-gate candidate review after field holdout and human review

operator_sequence: Fill field_activation_response_template.json with real field values.
Run field_activation_response_preflight until it is ready.
Only then assemble channel package candidates and run external activation router preflight.
field_activation_package_assembly_plan.no_write_boundary: The assembly plan only groups filled state-level evidence into package tables. It never creates field evidence by itself, never runs replay/holdout, and never writes actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

field_activation_package_staging_manifes.no_write_boundary: This staging manifest only tells an operator how to materialize filled field-activation response rows into external package directories for downstream preflight. It does not create field evidence, does not run replay/holdout, and cannot write actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

field_activation_materialized_package_pr.no_write_boundary: This preflight only checks whether an operator-materialized package directory matches the field activation staging manifest. It does not run replay/holdout, does not create field evidence, and cannot write actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

field_activation_downstream_r7_preview.no_write_boundary: This preview runs the downstream R7/Agent44 field replay package preflight as a read-only check. Even if R7 would pass, this artifact cannot resume the model chain, run replay/holdout, write actuator policy, write a release gate or label any conclusion field-supported.

field_activation_downstream_path_endpoin.no_write_boundary: This preview runs the downstream R8u66/Agent54 path-endpoint label preflight as a read-only check. Even if path labels would route to layout holdout, this artifact cannot resume the model chain, run holdout/replay, write actuator policy, write a release gate or label any conclusion field-supported.

operator_sequence: Submit a filled FIELD_ACTIVATION_RESPONSE_PATH before materializing any package directory.
Pass schema, response preflight and repair work order before package assembly/staging.
Materialize the selected package directory from the staging manifest.
Set the selected package pointer, such as REAL_FIELD_REPLAY_PACKAGE_DIR, only after the directory preflight passes.
Run experiments/run_external_activation_router.py, then downstream R7/Agent44 or path/endpoint preflights.
field_activation_external_readiness_gate.no_write_boundary: This readiness gate only orders existing field-activation preflights. It does not create field evidence, does not run replay/holdout, does not resume the model chain, and cannot write actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

top_repair_items.required_action: Fill outputs/model_core_governance/field_activation_response_template.json with real field provenance, save it as an external response JSON, then set FIELD_ACTIVATION_RESPONSE_PATH.
Set no_write_boundary_confirmed=true only after confirming the response cannot authorize actuator or release-gate writes.
Replace evidence_value template markers with actual operator-supplied field values before package assembly.
Fill batch_id and evidence_value_reference with real, traceable field/lab/table references.
Replace every template marker with real field provenance, values, methods or alignment references.

operator_submission_steps: Open outputs/model_core_governance/field_activation_response_template.json and copy it to an external response JSON before editing.
Replace every TODO/template marker with real field provenance, batch, timestamp, node, sensor, lab and operation evidence.
Only after response, repair, assembly, staging and materialized package preflights pass, run the external activation router.
field_activation_response_submission_pac.no_write_boundary: This submission packet only tells an operator how to submit and validate a filled field-activation response JSON. It does not generate field evidence, does not run replay/holdout, does not materialize a package directory, and cannot write actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

field_activation_schema_contract.no_write_boundary: This schema contract validates structure only. It permits template markers at schema-preflight time, but it cannot convert template/sample rows into field evidence and cannot write actuator policy, release gate, legal conclusions or field-supported claims.

field_activation_schema_preflight.no_write_boundary: Passing this schema preflight only proves that the response template and package assembly plan have the required fields and no-write boundary flags. It does not prove field evidence and cannot authorize model-chain resume, actuator writes or release-gate writes.
